text:
On Mon, Oct 01, 2001 at 09:41:23AM -0700, Komarov Valery wrote:
> 
> >Number:         30961
> >Category:       i386
> >Synopsis:       On lsdev -> error & BTX halted =(
> >Priority:       high
> >Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
[snip]
> I can't load FreeBSD 4.4 (firs loading before installations)
> On lsdev -> error & BTX halted =(
> MB Asus p2b-f
> On Asus p2b-b all ok

Just a shot in the dark, but - are you sure that this is not
a memory problem?  Did you put the same memory chips in both systems?
I've had BTX errors in lsdev *lots* of times with bad memory.

G'luck,
Peter
